name: Get the last 6 months of Zip performance for OpCo

content.query:
SELECT
[ZipCode]
,SUM([LeadCount]) as LeadCount
,SUM([NetSold]) as NetSold
,SUM([NetSalesAmount]) as NetSalesAmount
,SUM([GrossSalesAmount]) as GrossSalesAmount
,SUM([JobCount]) as JobCount
,CBSA_NAME
 FROM [EDW].[SUMM_FACT_ZIP_CODE_PERFORMANCE]
 where
[Division] = 'FHI'
and [EntryMonth] >= '2022-04-01'
group by 
[ZipCode]
,CBSA_NAME
order by NetSalesAmount desc


select * from
